creator: will@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed, thanks.  I should note that your pkg-message-fr won't be what's 
used in the packages built by bento, but the English version will.  Too bad 
the ports tree doesn't have i18n support.  :( 
Then again, neither does the base system (or at least not a very good one.)
